{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121816EA0076E00F77FAF95AAE"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593259986011079449","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《突然无敌的都市生活》以反套路叙事解构了传统“无敌流”小说，将超能力设定转化为深刻的哲学思辨。小说通过蜂群网络、意识融合等科幻元素，层层深入地探讨了个体与集体、自由与安全、差异与统一的永恒悖论。主角李炎从被动承受能力到主动承担“枢纽”责任的心路历程，勾勒出真正强大的内核——不是掌控万物的力量，而是包容万象的胸怀。作品在科幻冒险的表象下，埋藏着对人类意识本质和社会形态的严肃叩问，将通俗文学提升至思想实验的高度，展现出网络文学少见的叙事野心与人文关怀。","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":31,"text":"超能力","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774066696FAF95AAE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593259986011079449%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227582020820218678297%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767947765,"group_id":"7582020820218678297","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny4CDZ6fZM4lLapf3gjMPs2Bxij0pkoDtn0l3LOkbTXH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614448&x-signature=77B3F2V9HxLK4vsnQuBSstH5PAo%3D","user_id":"2920722574886859","user_name":"美好人生315"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2920722574886859","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582020820218678297","book_info":{"abstract":"我是李炎，一个PPT高手，直到在暗巷里本能地打趴三名劫匪，才发现身体里住着陌生高手。
散打、擒拿、古武奥义…无数战斗记忆汹涌苏醒，伴随脑海中的冰冷代号——“07号实验体”。白天我仍是加班的普通职员，夜晚却被迫闯入都市阴影：地下赌场的生死拳赛、神秘杀手的精准伏击、以及那句“实验体已达标，该回收了”。
更棘手的是，暗恋我的同事开始怀疑，而自称“昆仑”的组织已将我列为目标。我必须在下个 Deadline 前，从全球追杀和季度报告的双重压力中杀出生路。
当西装裹住足以开山裂石的拳头，我唯一能相信的，只有这身来路不明、却救我无数次的力量。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c4cde56931c9de11571c5761e47b7654~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"美好人生315","author_id":"","book_id":"7582020820218678297","book_name":"突然无敌的都市生活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585115039367954969","read_count":"3","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"427914"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"80","tags":"都市高武,都市,无敌,扮猪吃虎","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c4cde56931c9de11571c5761e47b7654~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250696&x-signature=pmJQ%2F79S6hSSmIBVW2YC6FsdQQI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2920722574886859","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121816EA0076E00F77FAF95AAE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4561,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1767947772,"author_reply_time":1768178077,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":f
